name: blackscience-tech-skills
description: Research, evaluation, developer tooling, and document workflow skills.

metadata.description: Research, evaluation, developer tooling, and document workflow skills.

plugins.name: academic-zh-en-translation
plugins.description: Translate academic papers, theses, dissertations, abstracts, literature reviews, methods, results, captions, and reviewer responses between Chinese and English with source-faithful completeness, discipline-appropriate terminology, and target-language academic idiom.

plugins.name: agent-client-protocol
plugins.description: Implement or debug Agent Client Protocol (ACP) integrations between coding agents and clients/editors.

plugins.name: answer-judging
plugins.description: Judge response quality from thread-only evidence.

plugins.name: benchmark-builder
plugins.description: Build high-quality benchmark items, embedded scoring contracts, review examples, rubrics, evaluators, and release protocols for model and agent evaluation.

plugins.name: bfts-config-prep
plugins.description: Prepare a BFTS run directory from idea JSON by generating idea.md and a configured bfts_config.yaml.

plugins.name: career-team-intel
plugins.description: Proactively research target companies, teams, and hiring decision makers (EM/TL/HM/recruiters) for job seeking using public, explicitly professional sources; interpret hiring-intent signals such as leader "we're hiring" posts, score confidence, and produce a team brief, contact map, outreach messages, and resume alignment.

plugins.name: code-simplifier
plugins.description: Safely simplify code with multi-metric quality gates.

plugins.name: experiment-bfts-runner
plugins.description: Run the standalone BFTS experiment pipeline to execute multi-agent tree-search experiments from a prepared bfts_config.yaml. Use after bfts-config-prep to produce logs, workspaces, and experiment artifacts.

plugins.name: experiment-log-summarizer
plugins.description: Summarize an experiment run directory into a draft report (Markdown + JSON) by scanning logs, summary JSONs, figures, and artifacts without executing code.

plugins.name: hpc-batch
plugins.description: Troubleshoot Slurm/LSF batch jobs, arrays, and stuck-job issues.

plugins.name: latex-to-word
plugins.description: Convert LaTeX (.tex) files to Word (.docx) using an automated preprocessing pipeline that resolves common pandoc incompatibilities such as custom commands, tabularx, and resizebox, minimizing manual cleanup afterward.

plugins.name: modern-python-style
plugins.description: Enforce modern Python 3.10+ syntax and typing with deterministic checks.

plugins.name: nix
plugins.description: Explain, write, and debug Nix expression language + common Nix workflows (flakes, nix CLI, nixpkgs).

plugins.name: paper-reviewer
plugins.description: Review academic papers (PDF/LaTeX/Markdown) with a ScholarEval-inspired dimension pass and produce both structured peer-review JSON (NeurIPS-style fields) and a concise human-readable review with prioritized, actionable feedback. Use for comprehensive, targeted, or comparative paper evaluation while keeping output bounded.

plugins.name: paper-visualizer
plugins.description: Route publication-grade visualization tasks by chart family and execute manuscript-facing plot or diagram workflows with packaged agents, shared generators, style guides, and inspectable run artifacts.

plugins.name: paper-writer
plugins.description: Single entry point for drafting or revising scientific papers, generating profile-based LaTeX scaffolds, harvesting draft-local citations into BibTeX, and auditing figure-caption-figref alignment from paper PDFs.

plugins.name: project-simplify
plugins.description: Reduce repository complexity by de-vendoring large third-party sources and replacing them with pinned release artifacts, checksum verification, and minimal subset extraction.

plugins.name: python-performance-tuning
plugins.description: Improve Python runtime and memory performance with a profile-first workflow.

plugins.name: research-ideation-novelty-check
plugins.description: Generate and refine research ideas and run a lightweight novelty sanity-check using Semantic Scholar.

plugins.name: research-impact-strategy
plugins.description: Decide whether a research idea, experiment thread, or paper draft is worth pursuing and how to sharpen it into one high-impact claim.

plugins.name: skill-manager
plugins.description: Manage and evolve Codex skills: create, update, and audit SKILL.md files together with their scripts, references, and assets; inventory installed skills; validate and convert Claude Code skills; and check shared runtime readiness.

plugins.name: token-cost-tracker
plugins.description: Summarize token usage and cost records from JSON or JSONL logs.

plugins.name: typst
plugins.description: Draft, convert, debug, and validate Typst documents.

plugins.name: wsl-fs
plugins.description: Use when the task needs to work with projects stored in the WSL Linux filesystem, including path translation, entering a distro, finding repos under /home, and running build or git commands in WSL instead of on Windows.

plugins.name: zotero
plugins.description: Capture (Zotero Connector), manage, search, and export Zotero libraries and collection-scoped citations using Zotero desktop + Better BibTeX, the Zotero Web API, a local Zotero data directory, or user-provided export files.
